extract: Venusaur (Japanese: フシギバナ Fushigibana) is a dual-type Grass/Poison Pokémon introduced in Generation I. It evolves from Ivysaur starting at level 32. It is the final form of Bulbasaur. Venusaur has two forms: It can Mega Evolve into Mega Venusaur using the Venusaurite. It can Gigantamax into Gigantamax Venusaur if it has the Gigantamax Factor. Gigantamax Venusaur was introduced in The Isle of Armor. Venusaur is the game mascot of Pokémon Green Version and its remake Pokémon LeafGreen Version, appearing on the box art of both games.
